content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Eating Europe: Director of Marketing & Commercial Operations Anywhere in the World 🇧🇬 Bulgaria, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇩🇪 Germany, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇭🇺 Hungary, 🇮🇹 Italy, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇷🇴 Romania, 🇷🇸 Serbia, 🇸🇰 Slovakia, and 🇺🇦 Ukraine Barcelona Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5365/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Rome <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.eatingeurope.com/">https://www.eatingeurope.com/</a> </p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><span>Director of Marketing &amp; Commercial Operations</span></strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><span>Eating Europe · Remote (Europe, CET ± 1) · Full-Time</span></strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><span>The Role</span></strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>This is a newly created C-Suite position reporting directly to our CEO. You'll be Eating Europe's most senior commercial leader — unifying Sales and Marketing into a single, revenue-focused operation for the first time, and building the strategy, team structure, and processes that allow us to scale with real ambition.</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>You'll own everything from brand strategy and digital marketing to B2B sales performance and OTA distribution. You'll lead a talented team of six, manage our external agency relationships (SEO, PPC, affiliates), and be the clear commercial voice at the senior leadership table.</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>This isn't a role for someone who wants a tidy brief and a settled team. It's for someone who thrives on building — who sees a fast-moving, startup-spirited business and thinks: I know exactly what to do here, and how to bring people along with me.</span></p> <div>&nbsp;</div> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><span>What You'll Own</span></strong></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>Commercial strategy across B2B (Sales &amp; Partnerships) and B2C (Marketing) — setting aligned OKRs and driving revenue growth</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>Brand strategy — creating Eating Europe's brand vision and guiding principles</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>Digital marketing — SEO, PPC, email, social, influencer, and website performance</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>Agency management — SEO agency (content and strategy), PPC agency, affiliates, web development</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>Revenue reporting and a centralised commercial dashboard for the CEO and senior team</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>CAC optimisation and marketing budget ownership</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>OTA and distribution channel strategy across Viator, GetYourGuide, and beyond</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>Process and structure — building clear workflows, accountabilities, and cross-team coordination so a previously siloed Sales and Marketing team operates as one cohesive, high-performing unit</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>A team: Sales Director, OTA Manager, Partnerships Coordinator, Marketing Manager (Content &amp; Social), CRM &amp; Campaigns Specialist, Marketing Coordinator, and small team of Content Creators</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><span>What We're Looking For</span></strong></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>A senior marketing leader first — someone with deep digital marketing expertise who also understands commercial operations and revenue</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>8+ years in a senior commercial or marketing leadership role, with P&amp;L or budget ownership</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>Proven track record of brand strategy — you've defined or significantly evolved a consumer brand before</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>A natural coach who invests in the people around them — spotting development needs, creating space to grow, and actively raising the capability of the team</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>Strong people manager — you build teams, not just manage individuals</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>Comfortable running external agency relationships and holding them to real accountability</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>Data-literate and analytically sharp — you build dashboards, not just read them</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>A leader who gives autonomy and builds genuine trust — not a micromanager, not a blame-thrower; someone whose team wants to run through walls for them</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><span>Europe-based, within CET ± 1 time zone</span></p> <p class="MsoListParagraph"><span>•<span>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
